name: official-lifestyle-plugins
description: Official Web Lifter lifestyle plugin marketplace — health & wellness, home & life logistics, personal finance, and personal productivity. Australian-context, evidence-rated, scenario-driven. Writes to the shared .project/ workspace (see OUTPUT-CONVENTIONS.md).

plugins.name: health-wellness
plugins.description: 5 lifestyle skills for meal planning, training programs, sleep optimisation, supplement stacks, and daily wellness habits — evidence-rated and AU-context aware

plugins.name: home-life-logistics
plugins.description: 4 lifestyle skills for trip planning, household maintenance, life-admin, and thoughtful gifting — AU-context checklists that turn logistics into routine

plugins.name: personal-finance
plugins.description: 5 lifestyle skills for AU personal budgeting, debt payoff, savings rate, retirement projection, and emergency runbooks — AU tax/super defaults, scenario-driven

plugins.name: personal-productivity
plugins.description: 4 lifestyle skills for habits, weekly resets, deep-focus days, and energy mapping — design daily and weekly systems that compound
